summary.en-US: Dictionnaire Littré complet, gratuit et hors-ligne

description.en-US:
Le dictionnaire de la langue fran\xE7aise d'\xC9mile Littr\xE9,
complet et enti\xE8rement gratuit, consultable hors-ligne.
78 599 entr\xE9es avec d\xE9finitions, \xE9tymologies et citations.
Recherche instantan\xE9e, mot du jour, favoris, renvois crois\xE9s
cliquables, mode sombre. Aucune connexion internet requise.
Donn\xE9es lexicographiques sous licence CC BY-SA 3.0
(Fran\xE7ois Gannaz, littre.org).

summary.en-US: E-ink friendly RSS/Atom reader for Android

description.en-US:
Lightweight RSS/Atom feed reader with a paginated reading mode
optimized for e-ink displays. Serif typography, adaptive font sizing,
tap zones for page turns. Bookmarks, OPML import/export, paid
Substack support via cookie authentication.
No accounts, no tracking — fully local and offline-capable.

summary.en-US: E-ink optimized e-book reader and library browser

description.en-US:
Open-source e-book reader optimized for e-ink displays. Paginated
EPUB reading with adaptive font sizing, high-contrast themes, and
tap zones designed for e-paper. Search and download from online
library catalogs. Local library management.
This application is a reading tool. It does not host any content.
Users are solely responsible for compliance with copyright laws
in their jurisdiction.
